{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323180249943701870B521F4D8BB2"}"},"total":2980},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7299597800822735653","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"看过不少三国了。有王道的，有霸道的，修仙流，召唤流的。有看尔不过擦标卖首的，也有谈笑间樯橹灰飞烟灭的。逗比的还是头一次见。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1699572505,"group_id":"7269901312580389925","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N0LDQ33stEC1wKGZsN2SN/Y=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"110495419192","user_name":"雾都小镇的那智真悟"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"110495419192","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7269901312580389925","book_info":{"abstract":"【三国】【无敌】【沙雕】【种田】【老六】
​穿越三国成为董卓手下的一员军官，开局觉醒万斤神力。
​只想苟全乱世的他，心态变了。
​大丈夫居于天地间，焉能久居人下？
​恰逢十八路诸侯讨董，苏云决定不再低调。
​百骑袭孙坚，败三英，杀穿18路诸侯，名声大噪，却遭受西凉集团排挤。
​忠臣不好做，那就做权臣！
​苏云毫不犹豫，带着贾诩一起跳曹，成为了曹操手里的两大老六。
​灭袁绍平刘备，伐匈奴征扶桑，讨西羌镇南蛮。
​董卓：悔不当初！早知道我就好好待他苏云了，我若得他真心相助，联军算个屁！
​袁绍：吾有上将颜良文丑，可斩苏…抱歉，我承认说话大声了点。
​周瑜：夺吾小乔，烧吾战船，大破赤壁火烧孙刘联军，全是苏云所为？既生瑜，何生云？
​吕布：啊！我被文官打了，有没有人为我发声？
​刘备：苏云神机妙算又勇武过人，非一方势力可敌，备建议正义群殴！
​蔡琰、大小乔、甄宓、糜贞：苏大哥太过完美，实乃良配！
​数年后…官至丞相的苏云指着鹿问：陛下你看它像马还是像鹿？
​皇后伏寿：苏丞相，凤榻坏了，今夜能劳烦过来修一修吗？
​曹操拿着黄袍而来：贤弟天冷了，加件衣吧！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/26c9502fe764e0efae44d1db0f8a8a67","author":"花颜小风筝","author_id":"","book_id":"7269901312580389925","book_name":"三国：一拳万斤力你管他叫文官？","book_short_name":"请主公，赴死","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#482018","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"21.5万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":272,"name":"历史脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=272&name=历史脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":67,"name":"三国","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=67&name=三国&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":384,"name":"无敌","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=384&name=无敌&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":778,"name":"搞笑轻松","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=778&name=搞笑轻松&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7269901389302596153","read_count":"214436","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"2413794"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.2","serial_count":"911","tags":"历史脑洞,历史,系统,穿越,三国,无敌,搞笑轻松","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2odf14631bf958e97b82cc4b48a984614e~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779444169&x-signature=O1iJDAhXDKmyLvpkDkca%2BEPGm84%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"105476100861","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"5.5601662e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323180249943701870B521F4D8BB2"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读15小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":46,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":55601,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":48859},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7429192718756954905","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"五星好评奉上，本书不是传统的三国争霸文，先说好的，全书风格是逗比加各种网络梗，主角刻画十分亮眼，群像描写也是栩栩如生，各个三国人物也是让人记忆深刻，如贾诩程煜这俩的毒计，如子龙的财迷，如张飞变成养猪大亨，如郭嘉与关羽专门写黄书等等，让人眼前一亮，而且主角也没什么扮猪吃老虎，就是一路无敌，每个三国文好像都在开后宫，但是主角是真的对后宫上心，也好评。说说坏的，没看够啊[奸笑]","text_exts":[{"e":58,"s":54,"text":"栩栩如生","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%A0%A9%E6%A0%A9%E5%A6%82%E7%94%9F&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317742601691F4D8BB2%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227429192718756954905%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227269901312580389925%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%A0%A9%E6%A0%A9%E5%A6%82%E7%94%9F%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1729750763,"group_id":"7269901312580389925","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+wo9RV6QYYxJsJ4KeFYIUAkiA2IZA9s8TaMBddcyaqC","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/c7cf4bae43a94a6cab4452178c3e7c4c~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776790409&x-signature=mkfi8x8k%2FPh7XA%2Fp757f1sTlEd0%3D","user_id":"4503218260811454","user_name":"克里斯蒂娜呦"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4503218260811454","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title
